scripts.postinstall: for dir in ./modules/*; do (cd $dir && pnpm install); done
scripts.build: for dir in ./modules/*; do (echo "building $dir ..." && cd $dir && pnpm build); done;
scripts.packages-update: for dir in ./modules/*; do (echo "building $dir ..." && cd $dir && pnpm packages-update); done;
scripts.update: for dir in ./modules/*; do (echo "updating $dir ..." && cd $dir && pnpm update); done;
scripts.format: for dir in ./modules/*; do (echo "building $dir ..." && cd $dir && pnpm format); done;
scripts.lint:css: for dir in ./modules/*; do (echo "building $dir ..." && cd $dir && pnpm lint:css); done;
scripts.lint:js: for dir in ./modules/*; do (echo "building $dir ..." && cd $dir && pnpm lint:js); done;
